---
title: Tutorials
sidebar: tutorials
---

The tutorials below are executable Jupyter notebooks demonstrating ClimateCritters models and utilities. Each notebook can be run locally after [installing the package](../get-started/installation.qmd).

## Getting started

| Notebook | What it shows |
|---|---|
| [CCModel Basics](../../notebooks/base_classes/ccmodel_basics.ipynb) | Base class interface: construction, `param_values`, integration, `CCOutput`, callable parameters, `register_forcing`, `set_function`, copying, `to_pyleo` |
| [Forcing Basics](../../notebooks/base_classes/forcing.ipynb) | All four `Forcing` construction patterns; `Hold`, `Ramp`, `Harmonic` elements; bundled datasets; `register_forcing` options |

## Model demos

These notebooks each cover a single model: setup, parameters, forcing, and output.

### Energy Balance Models

| Notebook | Model | What it shows |
|---|---|---|
| [0D EBM](../../notebooks/model_demos/ebm0d.ipynb) | `EBM0D` | Zero-dimensional EBM, albedo options (constant / `albedo_func` / custom callable), OLR, time-varying parameters, Euler vs RK45 |
| [1D EBM (latitude)](../../notebooks/model_demos/ebm1d_lat.ipynb) | `EBM1DLat` | Diffusive latitudinal EBM, ice-line, multi-axis latitude profiles, custom albedo via `set_function` |

### Oscillators

| Notebook | Model | What it shows |
|---|---|---|
| [SimplePendulum & Spring](../../notebooks/model_demos/pendulums_and_spring.ipynb) | `SimplePendulum`, `DampedSpring` | Simple harmonic oscillators, damping, forcing |
| [Double Pendulum](../../notebooks/model_demos/double_pendulum.ipynb) | `DoublePendulum` | Chaotic double pendulum, sensitivity to initial conditions |

### Climate Models

| Notebook | Model | What it shows |
|---|---|---|
| [ENSO](../../notebooks/model_demos/enso_recharge.ipynb) | `ENSORechargeOscillator` | Recharge oscillator model of ENSO variability |
| [Ganopolski 2024, Model 3](../../notebooks/model_demos/g24.ipynb) | `Model3` | Glacial-cycle model with ice-sheet and COâ‚‚ feedbacks |
| [Stommel THC](../../notebooks/model_demos/stommel.ipynb) | `Stommel` | Two-box thermohaline circulation, overturning diagnostic, two forcing attachment styles |

### Attractors

| Notebook | Model | What it shows |
|---|---|---|
| [Roessler](../../notebooks/model_demos/roessler.ipynb) | `Roessler` | Roessler attractor, phase-space visualization |
| [Lorenz63](../../notebooks/model_demos/lorenz63.ipynb) | `Lorenz63` | Classic Lorenz butterfly attractor, chaos and sensitivity |
| [Lorenz96](../../notebooks/model_demos/lorenz96.ipynb) | `Lorenz96` | Multi-scale Lorenz 1996 atmosphere model |

### Box Models

| Notebook | Model | What it shows |
|---|---|---|
| [Carbon Cycle](../../notebooks/model_demos/box_models_carbon.ipynb) | `TwoBoxCarbon` | Two-reservoir carbon cycle model using the composable box-model framework |

## Functionality demos

| Notebook | What it shows |
|---|---|
| [Noise](../../notebooks/functionality_demos/noise_demo.ipynb) | Generating colored noise and AR(1) surrogates |
| [Model noise](../../notebooks/functionality_demos/model_noise_starter.ipynb) | Adding stochastic noise to model output |
| [Downsampling](../../notebooks/functionality_demos/downsample_starter.ipynb) | Simulating irregular sampling from a model trajectory |
| [Solvers](../../notebooks/functionality_demos/solver_demo.ipynb) | Comparing numerical integration backends (Euler, RK45, SDE solvers) |
